# terrible_ibm_storage_virtualize_ibm_svc_manage_ip (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `clustername` (String) The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `ip_address` (String) Specifies a valid ipv4/ipv6 address.
- `state` (String) Creates (`present`) or removes (`absent`) an IP address.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *clustername*.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gateway` (String) Specifies the gateway address. Applies when *state=present*.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `log_path` (String) Path of debug log file.
- `node` (String) Specifies the name of the node.
- `old_ip_address` (String) Specifies the old IP address to be changed. If not provided, the value of *ip_address* will be used. Applies when *state=present*.
- `password` (String) REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) Specifies a port ranging from 1 - 16 to which IP shall be assigned.
- `portset` (String) Specifies the name of the portset object.
- `resetgateway` (Boolean) Specifies whether to reset the gateway to None. Applies when *state=present*.
- `resetvlan` (Boolean) Specifies whether to reset the vlan to None. Applies when *state=present*.
- `shareip` (Boolean) Specifies the flag when IP is shared between multiple portsets. Applies when *state=present*.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `subnet_prefix` (Number) Specifies the prefix of subnet mask. Required when *state=present*.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `token` (String) The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `username` (String) REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validates certification.
- `vlan` (Number) Specifies a vlan id ranging from 1 - 4096. Applies when *state=present*.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
